headline: American Express Turns Dining And Travel Perks Into A Lifestyle Platform
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) is expanding its premium dining and travel ecosystem with the upcoming launch of "The Summer Seat by Amex Gold & Resy." The company is building on its acquisitions of dining platforms, including Resy and Tock, to link reservations, exclusive events, and curated experiences with card benefits. Gold Card perks are being broadened to more tightly connect card usage with real world dining and travel experiences. For American Express, the core card business is...
